mapper.select: SELECT remaining_data FROM LINE WHERE line_id = #{lineId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT p.qos_speed_limit FROM LINE l JOIN PLAN p ON p.plan_id = l.plan_id WHERE l.line_id = #{lineId} AND l.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT remaining_data FROM LINE WHERE line_id = #{lineId} AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE LINE SET remaining_data = remaining_data + #{restoreAmount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE line_id = #{lineId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT pool_remaining_data FROM FAMILY WHERE family_id = #{familyId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT pool_remaining_data FROM FAMILY WHERE family_id = #{familyId} AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE FAMILY SET pool_remaining_data = pool_remaining_data + #{restoreAmount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE family_id = #{familyId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
